task_completion.description: Verify that the default 'Amateur' module has been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict interface. There should be no tab, window, or module named 'Amateur' visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'GSFC_Goddard' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration window or a ground station selection menu showing 'GSFC_Goddard'. If the configuration window is visible, verify the latitude is ~38.9951 N, longitude is ~76.8505 W (or -76.8505), and altitude is 50m.

task_completion.description: Verify a new tracking module named 'A_Train' is created and bound to the 'GSFC_Goddard' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window titled 'A_Train'. The ground station associated with this module (often displayed in the module's header, status bar, or settings) should be 'GSFC_Goddard'.

task_completion.description: Verify that AQUA, AURA, OCO-2, and GCOM-W1 (SHIZUKU) are being tracked in the 'A_Train' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the satellite list, radar view, or map view within the 'A_Train' module. You should see the names AQUA, AURA, OCO-2, and GCOM-W1 (or SHIZUKU), or their respective NORAD IDs (27424, 28376, 40059, 38337).

task_completion.description: Verify that satellite ground tracks are enabled and visible on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D map view in the 'A_Train' module. There should be visible lines (trajectories/paths) extending from the satellite icons, representing their future or past orbital ground tracks across the Earth's surface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through GPredict menus (e.g., Edit -> Preferences, or Module options) and dialog boxes, rather than editing configuration files (.config/Gpredict) directly in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be GPredict, identifiable by its distinct map views, polar plots, and satellite tracking interface, not a generic text editor or a mocked UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show step-by-step UI interaction (typing names, entering coordinates, searching for satellites) rather than a single terminal command executing a pre-written script to populate the GPredict state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The required satellites and their NORAD IDs are AQUA (27424), AURA (28376), OCO-2 (40059), and GCOM-W1 / SHIZUKU (38337). The GSFC_Goddard ground station coordinates must be approximately Latitude: 38.9951 N, Longitude: 76.8505 W (or -76.8505), Altitude: 50m.
